title: pyrus pyraster f. microphylla
intro: Pyrus pyraster f. microphylla, also known as the dwarf pear or small-leafed pear, is a shrubby form of the wild pear (Pyrus pyraster) that is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pyrus pyraster f. microphylla include its ability to help soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant's leaves and bark are used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
